```{r excluded_gene_lists}
#   excluded_nonsig              – genes that survived ALL filters but never achieved
#                                  sig_both == TRUE; does NOT overlap with preproc/postproc
#   excluded_overall             – union of all four categories

# 1. Pre-processing exclusions (from precluster_events, loaded in B.1)
excluded_preproc <- sort(unique(precluster_events$gene))

# 2. Post-processing: cluster-filter genes
excluded_postproc_clusters <- sort(unique(
  filter(gene_filter_flags, Cluster_removed)$Gene
))

# 3. Post-processing: gene-level filter (Extreme / Dubious / Both)
excluded_postproc_genefilter <- sort(unique(
  filter(gene_filter_flags, Extreme | Dubious)$Gene
))

# 4. All post-processing exclusions (union of 2 and 3)
excluded_postproc <- sort(unique(c(excluded_postproc_clusters, excluded_postproc_genefilter)))

# 5. Non-significant genes: survived all filters, but zero sig_both positions;
#    explicitly does NOT overlap with preproc / postproc categories
any_filtered_genes <- sort(unique(filter(gene_filter_flags, filter_combo != "None")$Gene))
genes_ever_sig     <- sort(unique(filter(discovery_std, sig_both)$gene))
survived_genes     <- sort(setdiff(unique(gene_filter_flags$Gene), any_filtered_genes))
excluded_nonsig    <- sort(setdiff(survived_genes, c(genes_ever_sig, excluded_preproc)))

# 6. Overall: union of all exclusion categories
excluded_overall <- sort(unique(c(excluded_preproc, excluded_postproc, excluded_nonsig)))

# ── Write to gene_relation_analysis/txt/excluded/ ────────────────────────────────────
gr_excl_dir <- file.path(gr_txt_dir, "excluded")
createDir(gr_excl_dir)

readr::write_lines(excluded_preproc,             file.path(gr_excl_dir, "excluded_preproc.txt"))
readr::write_lines(excluded_postproc_clusters,   file.path(gr_excl_dir, "excluded_postproc_clusters.txt"))
readr::write_lines(excluded_postproc_genefilter, file.path(gr_excl_dir, "excluded_postproc_genefilter.txt"))
readr::write_lines(excluded_postproc,            file.path(gr_excl_dir, "excluded_postproc.txt"))
readr::write_lines(excluded_nonsig,              file.path(gr_excl_dir, "excluded_nonsig.txt"))
readr::write_lines(excluded_overall,             file.path(gr_excl_dir, "excluded_overall.txt"))

cat("\n=== Excluded Gene Lists ===\n")
cat(sprintf("  excluded_preproc             : %d genes\n", length(excluded_preproc)))
cat(sprintf("  excluded_postproc_clusters   : %d genes\n", length(excluded_postproc_clusters)))
cat(sprintf("  excluded_postproc_genefilter : %d genes\n", length(excluded_postproc_genefilter)))
cat(sprintf("  excluded_postproc (union)    : %d genes\n", length(excluded_postproc)))
cat(sprintf("  excluded_nonsig              : %d genes\n", length(excluded_nonsig)))
cat(sprintf("  excluded_overall             : %d genes\n", length(excluded_overall)))
cat(sprintf("  Written to: %s\n\n", gr_excl_dir))
```

## B.6 Manhattan: genomic distribution of genes (CAAS density per gene length)

```{r manhattan_disambiguation, fig.height=8, fig.width=16}
if (!"chr" %in% names(gene_ensembl)) {
  cat("⚠ Chromosome information not available in gene ensembl file, skipping Manhattan plot\n")
} else {
  # Calculate retained CAAS density per gene across all CT positions.
  gene_caas_density <- discovery_std %>%
    group_by(gene) %>%
    summarise(
      n_caas_positions = n_distinct(site_id),
      frac_sig_both = mean(sig_both, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    left_join(gene_ensembl %>% 
              select(gene, chr, start, end) %>%
              mutate(gene_length = end - start + 1), 
              by = "gene") %>%
    filter(!is.na(chr), gene_length > 0) %>%
    mutate(
      caas_density = n_caas_positions / gene_length,
      log_caas_density = log10(pmax(caas_density, 1e-10))  # Avoid log10(0)
    )

  # Visualise all genes with at least one retained CT position.
  manhattan_data <- gene_caas_density %>%
    filter(caas_density > 0) %>%
    mutate(
      chr_num   = str_replace(chr, "chr", ""),
      chr_order = case_when(
        chr_num %in% as.character(1:22) ~ as.numeric(chr_num),
        chr_num == "X"                  ~ 23,
        chr_num == "Y"                  ~ 24,
        TRUE                            ~ 25
      ),
      pos = (start + end) / 2
    ) %>%
    arrange(chr_order, pos)

  if (nrow(manhattan_data) > 0) {
    # Cumulative chromosome positions and boundaries
    chr_lengths <- manhattan_data %>%
      group_by(chr_num, chr_order) %>%
      summarise(chr_max = max(pos, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      arrange(chr_order) %>%
      mutate(
        chr_start  = lag(cumsum(chr_max), default = 0),
        chr_end    = chr_start + chr_max,
        chr_center = chr_start + chr_max / 2
      )

    manhattan_data <- manhattan_data %>%
      left_join(chr_lengths %>% select(chr_num, chr_start, chr_end), by = "chr_num") %>%
      mutate(BPcum = pos + chr_start)

    n_genes_plotted <- n_distinct(manhattan_data$gene)
    n_chr_plotted <- n_distinct(chr_lengths$chr_num)
    manhattan_width <- min(22, max(16, 10 + 0.55 * n_chr_plotted))
    manhattan_height <- min(12, max(9, 8 + 0.015 * n_genes_plotted))

    p_manhattan <- ggplot(manhattan_data,
        aes(x = BPcum, y = caas_density)) +
      # Discontinuous chromosome boundary lines
      geom_vline(
        data        = chr_lengths,
        aes(xintercept = chr_end),
        linetype    = "dotted", color = "grey60", alpha = 0.7, linewidth = 0.4,
        inherit.aes = FALSE
      ) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.85, size = 3.1, color = "#2E86AB") +
      scale_x_continuous(
        labels = chr_lengths$chr_num,
        breaks = chr_lengths$chr_center,
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0.005, 0.005))
      ) +
      scale_y_continuous(
        labels = scales::label_number(scale_cut = cut_short_scale()),
        expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.08))
      ) +
      labs(
        title    = "Genomic distribution of retained CAAS density",
        subtitle = sprintf(
          "n = %d genes with retained CT positions | y = retained positions / gene length (bp)",
          n_genes_plotted
        ),
        x     = "Chromosome",
        y     = "CAAS density (retained positions / gene length)"
      ) +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 13),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank()
      )

    print(p_manhattan)
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(disambig_dir, "manhattan_caas_density.png"),
      plot     = p_manhattan, width = manhattan_width, height = manhattan_height, dpi = 320, dev = "png"
    )
  } else {
    cat("No genes with retained CT positions found — Manhattan plot skipped.\n")
  }
}
```

## 5. Impact Summary

```{r impact_summary}
cat("\n=== CT Post-Processing Impact Summary ===\n\n")

cat("Gene-level statistics:\n")
cat("  Total genes analyzed:", n_distinct(discovery_df$Gene), "\n\n")

cat("Position-level statistics:\n")
cat("  Total CT positions:", nrow(discovery_df), "\n")
if (nrow(filter_summary) > 0) {
  cat("  Positions flagged by cluster filtering:\n")
  for (i in 1:nrow(filter_summary)) {
    cat(sprintf("    minlen=%d, maxcaas=%.2f: %d positions\n", filter_summary$Minlen[i], filter_summary$Maxcaas[i], filter_summary$DiscardedCount[i]))
  }
}

summary_table <- tibble(
  Metric = c("Total CT Positions", "Unique Genes"),
  Value  = c(
    as.character(nrow(discovery_df)),
    as.character(n_distinct(discovery_df$Gene))
  )
)

kable(summary_table, caption = "CT Post-Processing Summary Statistics", align = c("l", "r")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))

write_tsv(summary_table, file.path(summary_stats_dir, "summary_statistics.tsv"))
cat("\n✓ Summary statistics exported\n")
cat("\n=== Analysis Complete ===\n")
```

## Session Info

```{r session_info}
sessionInfo()
```
